summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LaCleo.ai B2B lead generation platform. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% pass rate), but critical frontend Dashboard component crashes due to Select component error preventing normal usage.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem component error prevents Dashboard from rendering: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
ui_bugs.impact: Blocks entire dashboard functionality - users cannot access main features after login

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard crashes with Select component error, preventing access to lead generation and management features

passed_tests: User registration API and flow working
User login API and flow working
AI lead generation API working (with mocked data)
Company enrichment API working (with mocked data)
Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, stats, testimonials)
Hero search redirects to registration correctly
Registration form validation and submission working

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Landing page and auth flows work, Dashboard crashes

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem component error in Dashboard. The issue is likely in the industry filter dropdown where SelectItem components are missing required 'value' props or have empty string values. This prevents the entire Dashboard from rendering after successful login/registration. All backend APIs work perfectly, so this is purely a frontend component issue.
